response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (19+ years) with a strong technical depth in multiple languages and systems, including developer tooling and testing infrastructure. However, his direct experience in *people management* (2 years) is below the preferred 3 years for a mid-to-senior management role, and his recent leadership roles lack explicit organizational change leadership. His mobile platform experience is also limited, though he has relevant embedded/mobile work in the past.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in developer tooling and testing infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, AI-agent frameworks, CI/CD setup).
Proven track record in building scalable systems and contributing to open-source projects, demonstrating leadership in technical innovation.
Strong cross-functional collaboration experience across diverse industries (mobile, embedded, data platforms) and technical stacks.
concerns: Limited direct people management experience (2 years total) compared to the preferred 3+ years for a Level II Manager role.
No explicit experience leading organizational change (a preferred qualification) or managing larger engineering teams.
Mobile platform knowledge is outdated (last significant work was ~15 years ago) and lacks recent expertise in modern mobile ecosystems.

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure expertise
